properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v2 v3 v5 v3 v3 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: If My Heart Is Overwhelmed And I Cannot Hear Your Voice I'll Hold On To What Is True Though I Cannot See If The Storms Of Life They Come And The Road Ahead Gets Steep I Will Lift These Hands In Faith I Will Believe

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I Remind Myself Of All That You've Done And The Life I Have Because Your Son

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Love Came Down And Rescued Me Love Came Down And Set Me Free I Am Yours I Am Forever Yours Mountain High Or Valley Low I Sing Out And Remind My Soul I Am Yours I Am Forever Yours

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: When My Heart Is Filled With Hope And Every Promise Comes My Way When I Feel Your Hands Of Grace Rest Upon Me Staying Desperate For You God, Staying Humbled At Your Feet I Will Lift These Hands And Praise I Will Believe

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: I Am Yours, I Am Yours, All My Days, Jesus, I Am Yours I Am Yours, I Am Yours All My Days, I Am Yours

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: I Am Yours, I Am Yours, I Am Yours, Jesus, I Am Yours.
